# Best Resources for SEO

Here are the best resources for learning about SEO and digital marketing. We
have collected the most valuable links from across the internet to help you
improve your website rankings.

## SEO tools

- [Ahrefs](https://ahrefs.com) — SEO tool suite
- [Semrush](https://semrush.com) — Marketing toolkit
- [Moz](https://moz.com) — SEO software
- [Screaming Frog](https://screamingfrog.co.uk) — Website crawler
- [Google Search Console](https://search.google.com/search-console) — Free tool
- [Bing Webmaster](https://www.bing.com/webmasters) — Free tool
- [Yoast SEO](https://yoast.com) — WordPress plugin
- [Rank Math](https://rankmath.com) — WordPress plugin
- [SEOPress](https://www.seopress.org) — WordPress plugin
- [All in One SEO](https://aioseo.com) — WordPress plugin

## SEO blogs

- [Search Engine Journal](https://www.searchenginejournal.com)
- [Search Engine Land](https://searchengineland.com)
- [Search Engine Roundtable](https://www.seroundtable.com)
- [Moz Blog](https://moz.com/blog)
- [Ahrefs Blog](https://ahrefs.com/blog)
- [Semrush Blog](https://www.semrush.com/blog)
- [Backlinko](https://backlinko.com)
- [Neil Patel](https://neilpatel.com/blog)
- [HubSpot Blog](https://blog.hubspot.com/marketing)
- [Content Marketing Institute](https://contentmarketinginstitute.com)

## SEO courses

- [Google Digital Garage](https://learndigital.withgoogle.com/digitalgarage)
- [HubSpot Academy](https://academy.hubspot.com)
- [Semrush Academy](https://www.semrush.com/academy)
- [Moz Academy](https://moz.com/training)
- [Ahrefs Academy](https://ahrefs.com/academy)
- [Coursera SEO](https://www.coursera.org/courses?query=seo)
- [Udemy SEO](https://www.udemy.com/topic/seo)
- [LinkedIn Learning SEO](https://www.linkedin.com/learning/topics/seo)

- [r/SEO](https://reddit.com/r/SEO)
- [r/BigSEO](https://reddit.com/r/BigSEO)
- [GrowthHackers](https://growthhackers.com)

- [SEO Chat](https://www.seochat.com)
- [WebmasterWorld](https://www.webmasterworld.com)
- [BlackHatWorld](https://www.blackhatworld.com)
- [Warrior Forum](https://www.warriorforum.com)

## SEO conferences

- [MozCon](https://moz.com/mozcon)
- [SMX](https://marketinglandevents.com/smx)
- [Pubcon](https://www.pubcon.com)
- [BrightonSEO](https://www.brightonseo.com)
- [Ungagged](https://www.ungagged.com)
- [Chiang Mai SEO](https://chiangmaiseo.com)
- [SEO Mastery Summit](https://seomasterysummit.com)
- [Digital Summit](https://digitalsummit.com)

We hope these resources help you on your SEO journey. Bookmark this page and
check back often as we update it with new links regularly.
